title: Recursive display causes segmentation fault after commit e24197f
body:
* What 'verilator --version' are you using?  Did you try it with the git master version?

Segmentation fault on $fwrite function on commit e24197f, no issue on commit 63db60f. The issue still exist on git master version.

* What OS and distribution are you using?

WSL2 Ubuntu 23.10 + gcc v11 & v12
MacOS clang v14.0.3

The problem can be replicated with both envs. MacOS always stops at segmentation fault. In Ubuntu, running multiple times, segmentation fault occurs about 70% of the time and passes 30% of the time.

* How to replicate

I can't reproduce this issue with a simple test case. Attached [verilate_e24197f.tar.bz](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1vNkrQAC3P10BDSK9pajQaOPT4_ud26QZ/view?usp=drive_link) is a complex test case. Use "make failed" to run the failed case, and use "make pass" to run the passed case.

Search the source tree for the keyword "FAILED_CASE" to see the differences to test. An error occurred on the $fwrite function.
